testimonials.name: Rebecca T.
testimonials.text: The Merlin motor was diagnosed quickly and repaired on the first visit. Clear pricing and no pressure.

testimonials.name: Sam K.
testimonials.text: They paired new remotes, serviced the door, and made it much quieter. Very professional.

testimonials.name: Michelle L.
testimonials.text: Emergency callout after the door jammed open. The technician made it safe and fixed the issue.
